details.thirdSong: Bless the Lord, O My Soul
details.sermonTitle: The New Jerusalem: A Place or a People?
details.songOfResponse: Jesus, Keep Me Near the Cross #280

list: July 5: We will hold an “Ask Pastor Ken” forum during the evening service. Please send any questions you have for Ken about theology, church history, culture, parting wisdom, etc., to questions@manchesterbaptistchurch.org. After the service will be the annual Ice Cream Social in the Lewis Fellowship Hall.

July 6: Women on Mission will meet tomorrow at 6:00 PM in the Lewis Fellowship Hall. Linda Baker will present the program, and Rayanna Baker will provide the food. All women are encouraged and invited to attend. The July 26 fellowship meal will be discussed as well.

July 12: There will be a Special Called Business Meeting following the morning worship service. The purpose of the meeting will be to vote on the nominating committee members and to vote on a new treasurer.
July 26: Pastor Ken’s last Sunday with a fellowship meal to follow. Please plan to come and bring sides & desserts.

fighterVerse.text: For we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against powers, against the rulers of the darkness of this world, against spiritual wickedness in high places. Wherefore take unto you the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to withstand in the evil day, and having done all, to stand.
